displayTitle: The Old Republic: The Lost Suns #3
synopsis: Star Wars: The Old Republic — The Lost Suns is the third story arc in the Star Wars: The Old Republic comic series comic series, a tie-in to the Star Wars: The Old Republic massively multiplayer online role-playing game. Unlike the previous two installments, Threat of Peace and Blood of the Empire, it is not a reprint of web comic content available on the [http://www.swtor.com Star Wars: The Old Republic website], but an all new story focusing on Theron Shan, the son of Jedi Master Satele Shan. First revealed in Star Wars Insider 124, the series consisted of five issues released monthly, with the first one released on June 8, 2011.
title: The Old Republic: The Lost Suns #3
